name: Test Runner panel opens and shows test scripts list
description: When the user clicks the Test Runner button in the header, a modal opens showing a list of available TestSprite test scripts with Run buttons and a Run-all button.

planSteps.description: Verify the top header bar contains a button labeled for tests (with a terminal icon)
Click the tests button in the header to open the Test Runner modal
Verify a modal dialog opens overlaying the page with a title 'Test Runner'
Verify the modal contains a list of at least four test script entries, each with a Run button
Verify the modal has a Run-all button at the top of the list
Close the modal by clicking the X button in its header
Verify the modal is no longer visible
